User.title: User Profile
User.description: User account registration details, interests, and app settings.

interests.description: List of genres or categories interested in

theme.description: User interface preference: light or dark

Item.title: Item Definition
Item.description: An item (movie, book, or product) that can be rated, favorited, and recommended.

category.description: Category of the item (e.g. Movie, Book, Game)

tags.description: List of tag keywords for matching

imageUrl.description: URL or placeholder of the item image

Rating.title: User Rating
Rating.description: Rating of 1-5 stars given by a user to an item, along with review and sentiment.

userId.description: ID of the user who rated the item

itemId.description: ID of the item being rated

review.description: Detailed written review of the item

explanation.description: AI explanation behind rating or reaction if generated

Favorite.title: User Favorite
Favorite.description: Indicates a user has favorited a specific item.

userId.description: ID of the user who favorited the item

RecommendationLog.title: Recommendation Log
RecommendationLog.description: Log of recommendation responses generated for a user based on their query or profile.

userId.description: ID of the user receiving recommendations

query.description: The prompt or query string submitted, or automatic

/users/{userId}.description: Access profile and dashboard settings for users.

/items/{itemId}.description: Directory of items ready to be matched, recommended, and rated.

/ratings/{ratingId}.description: All item reviews and ratings left by users.

/favorites/{favoriteId}.description: Bookmark collection linking users to items.

/recommendations/{recommendationId}.description: Logged AI and content recommendations for historical recall.
